body_excerpt: In the broadcast definition in AndroidManifest.xml, there is a possible way to set the A2DP bluetooth device connection state due to a missing permission check. This could lead to local escalation of privilege with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足
